Incredible follow through in #ES_F. This morning I posted that traps of 7511 are actionable. 7511 was the overnight low. We swept it down to 7506, recovered, got long. I then gave the targets: 7530 (hit), 7560 (hit). 7560, 7578, 7590+ is next.

Ride runner now all week https://t.co/yhsJ28WyF7
updates.notes: All prices (7511, 7530, 7560, 7578) are morning-plan levels or observations of hits. '7590+' is vague/non-specific. No new actionable levels named.
